faq.a: Absolutely! This design serves as a foundation. You can simplify it by removing inner details, or enhance it by adding more motifs. Many artists personalize designs to match the wearer's preferences.

faq.q: How can I get the darkest stain with this mehndi?
faq.a: Leave the henna paste on for 6-8 hours (overnight is ideal). Apply a lemon-sugar sealant once dry, keep your hands warm, and avoid water for 12-24 hours after paste removal.

faq.q: What skill level is needed for this design?
faq.a: This design is best suited for beginners. It is rated "Easy" based on the intricacy of its patterns and the precision required.
